cases.prompt: 이 링크 본문만 깔끔하게 정리해줘 https://example.com/blog/post

assertions.text: The agent uses the Defuddle CLI to extract the page rather than WebFetch.
The agent returns clean markdown with navigation and clutter removed.
The agent frames the clean extraction as a way to save tokens versus raw HTML.

cases.prompt: Read this article for me: https://news.example.com/story

assertions.text: The agent extracts the article body as markdown via Defuddle.
The agent uses Defuddle instead of WebFetch for this standard HTML page.
The agent detects the .md extension and does NOT use Defuddle.
The agent uses WebFetch directly because the URL is already markdown.
